---
title: "Git and Reproducible Workflows"
subtitle: "Week 2"
description: "Monday April 20^th^, 2026"
---



## {{< fa person-chalkboard title="a person pointing at a chalkboard" >}} Lecture Materials {#lecture-materials}
| Lecture slides | Materials |
|----------------|-----------|
| [Lecture 2.1:  Git and GitHub](lecture-slides/lecture2.git-slides.qmd){target="_blank"} |  |



## {{< fa pencil title="pencil" >}} Assignments {#assignment-reminders}

| Assignment Type | Assignment Title                              | Date Assigned  | Date Due                   |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------|----------------------------|
| HW              | Homework Assignment - TBA | 16/4/2026      | 20/4/2026 , 11:59pm PT     |
: {.hover .bordered tbl-colwidths="[20,30,20,30]"}
